text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ngie
Date: Sat Jul 29 22:25:45 UTC 2017
New revision: 321706

Log:
  libprocstat(3): fix arguments list for procstat_getargv(3) and procstat_getenvv(3)

  Neither libcall takes a fourth argument (`char *errbuf`).

  PR:		217884
  Submitted by:	tobik
  MFC after:	1 month
